name: demo-video-generator-remotion
description: Remotion v4 composition layer for demo-video-generator.

scripts.gen-schemas: json-schema-to-zod -i ../schemas/composition.schema.json -o src/schemas/composition.zod.ts && json-schema-to-zod -i ../schemas/captions.schema.json -o src/schemas/captions.zod.ts && json-schema-to-zod -i ../schemas/analysis.schema.json -o src/schemas/analysis.zod.ts && json-schema-to-zod -i ../schemas/manifest.schema.json -o src/schemas/manifest.zod.ts && json-schema-to-zod -i ../schemas/error.schema.json -o src/schemas/error.zod.ts
